title: senecio productus subsp. magnus
intro: Senecio productus subsp. magnus, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to high-altitude regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mountain Ragwort are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and respiratory issues. Mountain Ragwort can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes.
